squads.name: Default
squads.description: General-purpose coordinator with the full team available.

squads.name: Skill Editor
squads.description: Skill editing focus: Skill editor plus the web agent for research and reference retrieval, and the registries crawler for sourcing existing skills.

squads.name: Registries Crawler
squads.description: Focused on crawling remote registries to find, inspect, and install skills on demand. The registries crawler is the sole member and leader of this squad.
